name: hetu-luoshu
description: HeTu LuoShu (河图洛书) — installs the Yi Jing's reasoning framework into AI: yin-yang (hold both poles), trigrams (decompose systems into composable states), change (every static answer must say where it heads). A dialectical/systemic/dynamic thinking discipline, not divination.
author: WUJI (wuji-labs)
